cta.title: A considered interior begins with a thoughtful project
cta.text:
We create spaces where every detail is carefully considered.
Comfort, logic, and aesthetics — brought together in one refined solution.

aboutFounder.name: Viktor Zlatovcen
aboutFounder.lead: I see design not as a collection of visual decisions, but as precise work with space, where every detail has meaning and purpose. My projects are built on thoughtful planning, considered ergonomics, and the desire to create interiors that are not only aesthetic, but genuinely comfortable to live in.
aboutFounder.text: As the founder of Zlatovcen Art Design, I pay close attention to the balance between architectural logic and visual expression. For me, it is essential that a space feels complete, contemporary, and relevant over time.
aboutFounder.imageAlt: Viktor Zlatovcen, founder of Zlatovcen Art Design

testimonialShowcase.quote: Every detail felt considered, refined, and impeccably resolved from start to finish.
testimonialShowcase.note: Working with Zlatovcen Art Design was smooth and comfortable throughout the entire process.
testimonialShowcase.author: Luke Collins

servicesPreview.title: The process of creating a bespoke project
servicesPreview.description: From the first consultation to final realization, every stage is shaped with attention to space and detail.
servicesPreview.imageAlt: Elegant interior detail with warm natural light

accessibility.listLabel: Stages of creating a bespoke interior design project

items.title: Space analysis
items.description: We begin with a detailed study of the property, the client’s lifestyle, and the planning specifics in order to create a strong foundation for the future interior.

items.title: Planning and concept
items.description: We develop functional zoning, furniture placement, and the overall spatial concept, bringing together comfort, ergonomics, and aesthetics.

items.title: Interior visualization
items.description: We create realistic 3D visualizations that allow you to see the atmosphere, materials, and character of the future interior in advance.

items.title: Working documentation
items.description: We prepare a complete set of drawings for project implementation — from lighting to furniture placement and engineering solutions.

items.title: Project realization
items.description: We support the renovation process, assist with material selection, and oversee the implementation of the project.

blogPreview.title: Latest articles
blogPreview.subtitle: Perspectives on interiors, materials, atmosphere, and subtle decisions that shape timeless living spaces.

items.title: Full design project
items.description: We develop more than a beautiful interior — we create a considered space where every detail, from planning to lighting, works for comfort, aesthetics, and ease of living. Special attention is given to smart planning, ergonomics, and movement logic, so the interior is not only visually refined, but also truly comfortable in everyday life. The project includes a full cycle of work, from idea and concept to realization.
includes: Selection of materials, furniture, lighting, sanitaryware, and more

items.title: Design project without visualization
items.description: A complete planning and technical interior solution without the 3D visualization stage. This format is suitable for those who want to move quickly into renovation with a clear understanding of the layout, furniture placement, and all technical decisions. We develop the space with standards, ergonomics, and movement logic in mind, and provide a full set of drawings and implementation recommendations so you can begin renovation confidently, without unnecessary mistakes or rework.
includes: Assistance with selecting materials, furniture, lighting, sanitaryware, and more

items.title: Architectural design
items.description: Development of the architectural appearance of a building with attention to proportions, materials, and overall style. We create a modern and harmonious facade that emphasizes the architecture of the home and makes it feel visually complete and aesthetically expressive. All key elements are carefully developed: finishing materials, color solutions, lighting, and facade details, so the final result feels considered and realistic to implement.
includes: Development of the facade concept and stylistic direction
Selection of materials and color solutions
Development of architectural details and elements

founderEditorial.title: I have always believed
founderEditorial.textLeft:
that an interior is not simply a space,
but an atmosphere where a person feels truly themselves.
In my projects, I aim to bring together
architectural aesthetics, functionality,
and a sense of inner comfort.
founderEditorial.textRight:
Every project is a search for balance
between contemporary expression,
restrained luxury, and the client’s individuality.
I create interiors that remain relevant for years.

faq.title: Answers to your questions
faq.subtitle: A few important answers about our process, collaboration format, and design approach.

groups.imageAlt: Elegant interior in neutral tones with a refined lounge area

items.question: What services do you provide?
items.answer: We offer residential and commercial interior design, including space planning, furniture selection, and bespoke design solutions. Our services also include project management and design for renovations.

items.question: How do I start a project with your studio?
items.answer: We begin with a personal consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and spatial needs. After that, we develop a tailored design direction, timeline, and project framework.

items.question: Do you work on full home transformations?
items.answer: Yes, we design both complete residential spaces and individual rooms. Every project receives the same level of attention to detail, coherence, and sensitivity to materials.

groups.imageAlt: Luxury living room with a sculptural furniture composition

items.question: Can you work on a project remotely?
items.answer: Yes, we can collaborate remotely depending on the scale and location of the project. We structure the process carefully to preserve clarity, visual precision, and a seamless client experience.

items.question: Do you help with furniture and material selection?
items.answer: Absolutely. We select furniture, finishes, lighting, and decor so that every element supports the overall atmosphere and identity of the interior.

items.question: How long does an interior design project usually take?
items.answer: The timeline depends on the scale and complexity of the project. After the first consultation, we provide a clear process outline with approximate stages and implementation timelines.
